name: oryntra
description: Live AI product review room for coding agents

scripts.build: npm run build -w @oryntra/core && npm run build -w @oryntra/facilitator && npm run build -w @oryntra/workspace && npm run build -w @oryntra/browser-service && npm run build -w @oryntra/server && npm run build -w @oryntra/review-room && npm run build -w @oryntra/cli && npm run build -w @oryntra/mcp && npm run build -w @oryntra/browser-extension
scripts.test: npm run test -w @oryntra/facilitator && npm run test -w @oryntra/workspace
scripts.collaborate:restart: npm run build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js collaborate --workspace apps/demo-app --url http://127.0.0.1:4318 --restart-server
scripts.collaborate:broken: npm run build && npm run demo:reset && node packages/cli/dist/index.js collaborate --workspace apps/demo-app --url http://127.0.0.1:4318 --fresh --restart-server
